name: apex-query-validator
description: Validating SOQL/SOSL Queries in Apex Classes Without 'DAO' or 'Test' in Name

apexQueryValidator.exemptFilenameKeyword.description: Lowercase filename substrings that exempt a file from validation (e.g. files with 'dao' or 'test' in their name).

apexQueryValidator.includeGlobs.description: Glob patterns identifying which files should be validated for embedded SOQL/SOSL queries.

apexQueryValidator.diagnosticSeverity.description: Severity level used for SOQL/SOSL findings reported in the Problems panel.

apexQueryValidator.autoValidate.description: Automatically run validation when an Apex file is opened or saved, in addition to running it manually via the command.

apexQueryValidator.daoFilenameKeywords.description: Filename substrings identifying DAO files where SOQL/SOSL queries should be moved. Used to power the Quick Fix suggestion that navigates to the matching DAO.
